recommendations.title: Meus 15 Anos: Filme
recommendations.overview: A shy student suddenly becomes the center of attention when she wins a huge birthday party that she never asked for.

recommendations.title: An Inconvenient Sequel: Truth to Power
recommendations.overview: A decade after An Inconvenient Truth brought climate change into the heart of popular culture comes the riveting and rousing follow-up that shows just how close we are to a real energy revolution. Vice President Al Gore continues his tireless fight,

recommendations.title: Like Minds
recommendations.overview: A forensic psychologist must determine if a minor should be charged with murder.

recommendations.title: Bachelorette
recommendations.overview: Three friends are asked to be bridesmaids at a wedding of a woman they used to ridicule back in high school.

recommendations.title: Jane
recommendations.overview: Drawing from never-before-seen footage that has been tucked away in the National Geographic archives, director Brett Morgen tells the story of Jane Goodall, a woman whose chimpanzee research revolutionized our understanding of the natural world.

recommendations.title: Lee
recommendations.overview: The true story of photographer Elizabeth "Lee" Miller, a fashion model who became an acclaimed war correspondent for Vogue magazine during World War II.

recommendations.title: The Salt of the Earth
recommendations.overview: During the last forty years, the photographer Sebastião Salgado has been travelling through the continents, in the footsteps of an ever-changing humanity. He has witnessed the major events of our recent history: international conflicts, starvations a

recommendations.title: Before the Flood
recommendations.overview: A look at how climate change affects our environment and what society can do to prevent the demise of endangered species, ecosystems, and native communities across the planet.

recommendations.title: Waltz with Bashir
recommendations.overview: An Israeli film director interviews fellow veterans of the 1982 invasion of Lebanon to reconstruct his own memories of his term of service in that conflict.

recommendations.title: The Dissident
